rationale: In the citing paper, Bruce, Murthi, and Rao (2017) is cited only in grouped lists as an example of prior Bayesian dynamic/nonlinear advertising work and prior particle-filter-based applications in marketing. The text does not engage this specific paper's theory, model components, empirical results, or measures in a way that shapes the new algorithms or interpretation. Its role is background positioning of the literature rather than a distinct, paper-specific building block.
